debug_info.goal:
L : Logic ℕ
χ ξ : Formula ℕ
T : LO.Propositional.FTheory L
hT : χ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
inst✝ : Entailment.F L
⊢ ∀ (φ ψ : Formula ℕ),
    φ ➝ ψ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T →
      φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT →
        ψ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT

failed_attempts:
intro φ ψ hφψ hφ
  rcases of_mem_construction_omega hφ with h | h
  · -- Case 1: χ ➝ φ ∈ T.theory
    exact mem_omega_of_mem (T.mem_trans h hφψ)
  · -- Case 2: ∀ Γ ⊆ U_{encode φ}, Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory
    by_contra hψ
    obtain ⟨_, Γ, hΓ₁, hΓ₂⟩ := of_not_mem_construction_omega hψ
    -- Step 1: (Γ.conj ⋏ φ) ➝ ψ ∈ T.theory
    have step1 : (Γ.conj ⋏ φ) ➝ ψ ∈ T.theory :=
      T.mem_trans (T.mem_of_provable andElimR) hφψ
    -- Step 2: (Γ.conj ⋏ φ) ➝ Γ.conj ∈ T.theory
    have step2 : (Γ.conj ⋏ φ) ➝ Γ.conj ∈ T.theory :=
      T.mem_of_provable andElimL
    -- Step 3: (Γ.conj ⋏ φ) ➝ (Γ.conj ⋏ ψ) ∈ T.theory
    have step3 : (Γ.conj ⋏ φ) ➝ (Γ.conj ⋏ ψ) ∈ T.theory :=
      T.imp_closed axiomC (T.andIR step2 step1)
    -- Step 4: (Γ.conj ⋏ φ) ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory
    have step4 : (Γ.conj ⋏ φ) ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory :=
      T.mem_trans step3 hΓ₂
    -- Step 5: (insert φ Γ).conj ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory
    have step5 : (insert φ Γ).conj ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory := by
      have h1 : L ⊢ (insert φ Γ).conj ➝ (Γ.conj ⋏ φ) := by
        apply ruleC
        · exact (CFConjFConj_of_subset (Finset.subset_insert φ Γ) : L ⊢ _)
        · have := (CFConjFConj_of_subset (Finset.singleton_subset_iff.mpr (Finset.mem_insert_self φ Γ)) : L ⊢ (insert φ Γ).conj ➝ ({φ} : Finset _).conj)
          simp [Finset.conj] at this
          exact this
      exact T.mem_trans (T.mem_of_provable h1) step4
    -- Step 6: insert φ Γ ⊆ construction_omega T hT
    have step6 : ↑(insert φ Γ) ⊆ construction_omega T hT := by
      rw [Finset.coe_insert]
      exact Set.insert_subset hφ (fun x hx => Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨_, hΓ₁ hx⟩)
    -- Contradiction
    exact construction_omega_consistent (insert φ Γ) step6 step5
